decision: Gate I passed for devmasterd local kernel.
summary: Reviewed localhost-only devmasterd smoke evidence: unauthorized requests returned 401, authorized intake/authorization/provider/evidence path passed, state and evidence persisted under runtime/devmasterd, and no external side effects occurred.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Phase 7 devmasterd operational validation. Keep Web Console, IDE extension, real provider calls, subscription CLI daemonization, external repo mutation, deploy, PR creation, and production side effects out of scope.
notes: Gate I pass validates localhost daemon kernel only.
